title: ConvertKit vs EmailOctopus (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ConvertKit vs EmailOctopus: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ConvertKit and EmailOctopus comes down to your specific use case. ConvertKit is built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while EmailOctopus targets budget-conscious creators and small businesses.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on creators, bloggers, and course sellers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on budget-conscious creators and small businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ConvertKit wins for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while EmailOctopus is stronger for budget-conscious creators and small businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or EmailOctopus?
faq.a: EmailOctopus starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from EmailOctopus to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
